name: chrome-github-icons
description: Cross-browser extension that replaces GitHub file icons with Material Design icons.

scripts.build:firefox: npm run sync:assets && wxt build -b firefox
scripts.build:safari: npm run sync:assets && wxt build -b safari
scripts.firefox: npm run sync:assets && wxt zip -b firefox
scripts.safari: npm run sync:assets && wxt zip -b safari
scripts.zip:firefox: npm run sync:assets && wxt zip -b firefox
